## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the underlying need, not the solution. What are you trying to do that's hard today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How you'd like it to work. Mockups, sketches, or API shapes are welcome but optional. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about, and why you didn't pick them. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else we should know. -->

---

**Please note:** TensorChat is on-device and privacy-first by design. Features that require cloud LLM inference, telemetry, analytics, or user accounts are out of scope. Optional network features must be opt-in and off by default.
